checkHeading: Check your answers before creating draft report
checkSummaryLogDataGuidance: If any information in this section is incorrect, cancel this report, upload an updated summary log and create a new report.
correctionPrefix: If anything is missing or incorrect,
deleteBodyGuidance: You'll be able to start creating the report again from your reports page.
deleteBodyWarning: Confirm that you want to delete this report. This action cannot be undone.
destinationHeading: Final destination of waste sent on
detailHeading: Your summary log data for {{ periodLabel }}
emptyState: There are no reporting periods with data.
heading: Reports
lastUploadedAt: Your most recent summary log was uploaded at {{ time }} on {{ date }}.
overviewIntro: The following is an overview of your summary log data for {{ periodLabel }}. Only the data that will appear in your report is shown here.
supportingInformationError: Supporting information must be 2,000 characters or fewer
supportingInformationHeading: Add supporting information for your regulator (optional)
supportingInformationHint: Include any extra information you think your regulator will find useful.
tonnageSentOnToExporters: Total tonnage sent on to exporters
tonnageSentOnToOtherSites: Total tonnage sent on to other sites or facilities
tonnageSentOnToReprocessors: Total tonnage sent on to reprocessors
wasteExportedIntro: The data for waste exported comes from your summary log. Your report will be accurate if all the necessary data has been added.
wasteReceivedForExportIntro: The data for waste received for export comes from your summary log. Your report will be accurate if all the necessary data has been added.
wasteReceivedIntro: The data for waste received comes from sections 1 and 2 of your summary log. Your report will be accurate if all the necessary data has been added to these sections.
wasteSentOnIntro: This information is based on the data in sections 5, 6 and 7 of your summary log. Your report will be accurate if all the necessary data has been added to these sections.
